limitations: The labels are owner-approved prototype evidence, not independent ground truth.
Six events satisfy only the frozen count minimum; the separate sufficiency evaluator has not passed.
Dataset, split, baseline, and model versions remain null.

decision.rationale: Every candidate gate passes, including exact owner rendering, but PR, merge, fresh-main verification, and annotated-tag peel have not run yet.
decision.next_action: Commit and push the U06 audit records, open one coherent milestone PR, merge after checks pass, verify fresh main, then create and remotely peel v0.47.0-windigo-sixth-prototype-event.
